summary:
Step 8 'Expected filter tab 'All' to be visible so services could be filtered to show API Gateway.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The dashboard does not provide the expected service search input or filter tabs for filtering services.

Observations:
- No service search input or filter tabs labeled 'All' or 'Down' were found in the Services area; only an email alerts input (placeholder 'you@company.com') is present.
- Service cards (including 'API Gateway') are visible, but there is no UI control to type a search query or to switch filter tabs on the page.
